market_overview.headline: Market showing strong bullish structure with 53% of stocks in Full Bull mode and cyclical sectors leading the charge.
market_overview.detail: 140 names in Full Bull vs only 59 in Full Bear, with energy and materials showing 100% bullish participation. Tech services remains the primary headwind with 90% bearish participation.

momentum_themes.headline: Semiconductor & Memory Momentum Acceleration
momentum_themes.detail: Electronic technology showing explosive momentum with memory stocks leading - WDC up 28%, MU up 26% vs 21W. Storage and semiconductor equipment names dominating momentum rankings.

sector_analysis.headline: Cyclical Sectors Dominating, Tech Services Lagging

strongest.note: Perfect bullish participation with 12.4% average gains vs 21W
Materials showing broad strength with 17.6% average outperformance
Small but strong sector showing complete bullish alignment

weakest.note: Complete bearish structure across small sample
Discretionary spending concerns weighing on sector

sector_analysis.detail: Clear cyclical rotation with commodities and industrials leading while growth tech remains under pressure. Finance sector mixed but showing improvement with 33 pullback setups.

items.text: Tech services sector showing extreme weakness - 90% bearish participation could spill into broader market
24 Bull Breakdowns signal potential cracks in uptrend structure
Finance sector remains mixed despite pullback setups - watch for broader financial stress
Health technology showing deterioration with NONOF down -26% leading bears
